mapper.sql: SELECT STNG_CTGRCD AS cfgCtgrCd , CTGRNM AS ctgrNm , CTGR_EXPLN AS ctgrDesc , USEYN AS useYn , RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = RGTR_ID) AS regNm , FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = MDFR_ID) AS modNm , MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM TB_SYS_CFG_CTGR

where.if: AND ( LOWER(STNG_CTGRCD) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(CTGRNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )

mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : SysCfgCtgrDAO.list 설 명 : 설정 분류의 전체 목록 */
ORDER BY CTGRNM
/* SQL ID : TbSysCfgDAO.listConfig 설 명 : 설정 분류의 전체 목록 */
/* SQL ID : SysCfgCtgrDAO.listPageing 설 명 : 설정 분류의 페이징 목록 */
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : SysCfgCtgrDAO.insertOrg 설 명 : 시스템 설정 관리 > 설정 관리 insert */ BEGIN; INSERT INTO TB_ORG_CFG_CTGR ( ORG_ID ,STNG_CTGRCD ,CTGRNM ,CTGR_EXPLN ,USEYN ,RGTR_ID ,FRST_INQ_DTTM ,MDFR_ID ,MOD_DTTM ) SELECT #{orgId} AS ORG_ID ,A.STNG_CTGRCD AS STNG_CTGRCD ,A.CTGRNM AS CTGRNM ,A.CTGR_EXPLN AS CTGR_EXPLN ,A.USEYN AS USEYN ,#{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID ,FN_DTTM() AS FRST_INQ_DTTM ,#{mdfrId} AS MDFR_ID ,FN_DTTM() AS MOD_DTTM FROM TB_SYS_CFG_CTGR A WHERE A.STNG_CTGRCD = #{cfgCtgrCd}; INSERT INTO TB_ORG_CFG ( ORG_ID , STNG_CTGRCD , STNG_CD , STNGNM , STNG_VL , STNG_EXPLN , USEYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT #{orgId} AS ORG_ID ,B.STNG_CTGRCD AS STNG_CTGRCD ,B.STNG_CD AS STNG_CD ,B.STNGNM AS STNGNM ,B.STNG_VL AS STNG_VL ,B.STNG_EXPLN AS STNG_EXPLN ,B.USEYN AS USEYN ,#{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID ,FN_DTTM() AS FRST_INQ_DTTM ,#{mdfrId} AS MDFR_ID ,FN_DTTM() AS MOD_DTTM FROM TB_SYS_CFG B WHERE B.STNG_CTGRCD = #{cfgCtgrCd}; COMMIT;
